title: Change Event Source Framework

classes.name: ChangeEventSourceContextImpl
classes.notes: Uses lock/condition variables to synchronize snapshot↔streaming handoff and blocking snapshot pausing.

relationships: ChangeEventSourceCoordinator composes SnapshotChangeEventSource<P,O> (created via factory, held as field)
ChangeEventSourceCoordinator composes StreamingChangeEventSource<P,O> (created via factory, held as field)
important_notes: ChangeEventSourceCoordinator is @ThreadSafe; uses two ExecutorService threads: 'change-event-source-coordinator' and 'blocking-snapshot'
ChangeEventSourceContextImpl uses ReentrantLock + 3 Conditions to coordinate snapshot/streaming phase transitions
Blocking snapshot flow: pauses streaming via isPaused flag → context.waitStreamingPaused() → run snapshot → resume streaming

Coordinator is generic over

— supports multi-partition connectors
StreamingChangeEventSource.executeIteration() is optional (throws UnsupportedOperationException by default) for multi-partition iteration
